text.title: Tool Use — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a model-emitted tool call by safety class to auto-execute / human-gated / refuse.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the tool name registered in tools.yaml?

conclusion.verdict: REFUSE; return error to model with list of available tools (fm-03 fix)

branch.question: Do model-emitted args validate against the tool's JSON Schema?

conclusion.verdict: REFUSE; return validation error to model for repair
REFUSE; rate limit hit; log + return error
HUMAN GATE; pause execution, request approval, then execute on approve

example.trace: send_email + valid args + rate OK → execute
example.code: registered=true → args_valid=true → safety_class=mutating → q-rate → rate_ok=true → r5-audit-every-call verdict: execute + audit
